closest_to_camera: Which option describes the wall-mounted object closest to the camera?
Which option describes the wall object nearest to the camera?
Use the perspective depth cues to choose the wall object closest to the camera.
Which option describes the wall-mounted object closest to the viewer?
Among the candidate wall-mounted objects, which option is nearest to the camera?
same_wall_reference: Which option describes the wall-mounted object on the same wall as the {reference_name}?
Choose the option for the wall-mounted object on the same wall as the {reference_name}.
Which option describes the object that shares a wall with the {reference_name}?
Which option describes the wall object that shares the wall with the {reference_name}?
Which option describes the wall-mounted object mounted on the same wall as the {reference_name}?
left_of_reference_on_wall: Which option describes the wall-mounted object to the left of the {reference_name} along the same wall?
Choose the option for the object to the left of the {reference_name} on that wall.
Using the wall plane, which option describes the object left of the {reference_name}?
Which option describes the object sitting left of the {reference_name} along the wall?
On the wall with the {reference_name}, which option describes the object to its left?
right_of_reference_on_wall: Which option describes the wall-mounted object to the right of the {reference_name} along the same wall?
Choose the option for the object to the right of the {reference_name} on that wall.
Using the wall plane, which option describes the object right of the {reference_name}?
Which option describes the object sitting right of the {reference_name} along the wall?
On the wall with the {reference_name}, which option describes the object to its right?

global.object_description: a perspective indoor room with floor, walls, furniture, room objects, and wall-mounted objects
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected wall-mounted object in the scene
